title: stelis trullifera
intro: Stelis trullifera, also known as the helmet orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis trullifera include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
